mentions.raw_name: Victarion Greyjoy (the Iron Suitor, the iron captain, lord Captain)
The Vole (a Sparr by birth, captain of Grief)
Isle of Cedars (Isle of a Hundred Battles, Isle of Monkeys)
Velos (drowned city on Isle of Cedars)
Ghozai (slaver port on Isle of Cedars)
Maesters (the order — Kerwin is a maester with a chain)
The Drowned God (Victarion's faith; watery halls; drowning and returning; salt water as holy; sacrifice; "no godless man may sit the Seastone Chair")
The Storm God (Victarion curses him for the fleet's losses; seen as adversary to the Drowned God)
R'hllor, the Lord of Light (Moqorro's faith; nightfires; fire rituals; red priests in foreign cities tend sacred fires; red robes of silk and velvet and lambswool)
Ironborn (iron price, salt wives, thralls, Seastone Chair, kingsmoot)
Volantenes (triarchs, slave soldiers, green galleys, great dromonds of war)
Ghiscari (men from New Ghis; stepped pyramids of Ghozai)
Summer Islanders (nut brown skin, swan ships)
Dornishmen (mentioned with contempt — "poison is for cravens, women, and Dornishmen")
Velosi (people of Velos, drowned in the Doom)
Lobstered steel gauntlet (Victarion's, cut through by Serry)
Strange high wailing song in High Valyrian (sung during Moqorro's ritual)
mentions.section: Raw Entity List > In-world Texts & Songs

mentions.raw_name: R'hllor's nightfires (Moqorro sees visions in flames — saw Victarion, his death, Daenerys's wedding)
Fire healing ritual (blade, brazier, fire; terrible pain; results in charred but healed hand with smoke rising)
The Doom of Valyria (wall of water 300 feet high; destroyed Velos and Ghozai; referenced as 400 years ago)
Red winds out of Valyria (smelled of ash and brimstone)
Moqorro's survival (ten days in the water — seemingly impossible for a mortal man)
Drowned God's power (drowning and returning to life; holy salt water; Aeron has seen the watery halls)
Poisoned arrows (bog devils at Moat Cailin; recalled)
Dark disturbing dreams (Victarion's, on the Isle of Cedars; woke with mouth full of blood)
Battle/Taking of the Shields (where Victarion fought Serry; the fleet departed from there)
War against Meereen / Slaver's Bay campaign (Volantenes, Yunkai, Astapor, New Ghis, Qarth, Tolos allied against Daenerys)
Siege of Moat Cailin (recalled — bog devils with poisoned arrows)
Kingsmoot (Euron chosen over Victarion and other candidates)
Lord Captain (Victarion's title as commander of the Iron Fleet)
Lord of Oakenshield (title given by Euron to Nute the Barber)
Triarch (rulers of Volantis — new triarchs celebrated)
Monkeys (plague infesting the fleet and the Isle of Cedars; flee the ship during Moqorro's ritual)
Boars/pigs (biggest, blackest boars the ironborn had ever seen; hunted for provisions on the Isle of Cedars)
